name: Stripe
description: Global payments infrastructure company providing APIs for online checkout, billing, subscriptions, and marketplace payouts for internet businesses of every size worldwide.
innovation_rationale: Launched Stripe Atlas in 2016, letting founders incorporate Delaware C-corps and open US bank accounts entirely online.
market_traction_rationale: Processed over $1 trillion in payment volume in 2023 across millions of merchant accounts globally.
competitiveness_rationale: Operates in 46 countries with support for 135+ currencies and direct card network partnerships with Visa and Mastercard.
product_depth_rationale: Product suite spans Payments, Billing, Connect payouts, Radar fraud tools, and Atlas incorporation services.
social_proof_rationale: Ranked #1 on the Forbes Cloud 100 in 2023 and used by Amazon, Shopify, and Google for online payments.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace platform combining notes, wikis, tasks, and databases for teams and individuals building docs and project workflows collaboratively online.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered block-based docs where text, tables, and embeds share one editable canvas, reaching 30M users by 2022.
market_traction_rationale: Raised $275M Series E in 2021 led by Coatue and Sequoia at a $10B valuation reported by TechCrunch.
competitiveness_rationale: Replaced separate Confluence, Trello, and Google Docs stacks for 50% of Y Combinator startups per 2023 survey data.
product_depth_rationale: Ships Notion AI, Calendar, Sites publishing, and 10,000+ community templates across Free, Plus, and Enterprise tiers.
social_proof_rationale: Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies list in 2023 and adopted by Figma, Pixar, and Nike internal teams.

name: Figma
description: Browser-based collaborative design platform for UI, UX, and product teams to create prototypes, design systems, and handoff specs in real time together.
innovation_rationale: Introduced multiplayer canvas editing in 2017, letting 3+ designers co-edit the same Figma file simultaneously in-browser.
market_traction_rationale: Grew to 4 million users by 2022 and reported $400M ARR before Adobe's abandoned $20B acquisition in 2023.
competitiveness_rationale: Captured 77% of new UI design tool adoption among startups versus Sketch per 2022 State of Design survey.
product_depth_rationale: Offers Figma Design, FigJam whiteboards, Dev Mode inspect, and Slides presentation tools in one platform.
social_proof_rationale: Won Fast Company Most Innovative Companies 2022 and powers design workflows at Microsoft, Uber, and Airbnb.
